title: Delhi court grants interim bail to Al Falah University chairman Jawad Ahmed Siddiqui in ED case
description: A Delhi court on Friday granted two weeks of interim bail to Al Falah University chairman Jawad Ahmed Siddiqui in the money laundering case being investigated by the Directorate of Enforcement (ED). The University had come under scanner after the security agencies revealed that Dr Umar Nabi, who carried out the Red Fort blast last year, had been employed there. Additional Sessions Judge (ASJ) Sheetal Chaudhary Pradhan of the Saket court allowed the interim bail plea filed by Siddiqui&n
